user.title: BFE Rückliefertarif — choose utility
user.description:
## 2026 Swiss feed-in remuneration overview

| Utility | Base price | HKN remuneration (opt-in) | Cap enforced | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| EKZ | Reference market price | up to 3.00 Rp/kWh | **Yes** | Cap reduces HKN if base+HKN > ceiling |
| BKW | Reference market price | up to 2.00 Rp/kWh | No | naturemade-star required for HKN |
| CKW | Reference market price | up to 3.00 Rp/kWh | No | |
| Groupe E | Reference market price | up to 4.00 Rp/kWh | **Yes** | |
| Primeo Energie | Reference market price | up to 2.00 Rp/kWh | **Yes** | |
| Romande Energie | Reference market price | 1.50 Rp/kWh | No | |
| SAK | Reference market price | up to 1.50 Rp/kWh | No | |
| SGSW | Reference market price | up to 4.60 Rp/kWh | No | |
| ewz | Fixed 7.91 Rp/kWh | up to 5.00 Rp/kWh (additive) | No | |
| IWB | Fixed 12.95 Rp/kWh | included in base | No | 12-year contract |
| SIG | Fixed 8.16 Rp/kWh | up to 2.80 Rp/kWh (additive) | No | |
| AEW Fixpreis | Fixed 8.20 Rp/kWh (≤30 kW) | included in base | No | naturemade-star required |
| AEW RMP | Reference market price | none | No | All sizes |

**Cap enforced** = whether the utility caps total remuneration at the per-plant cost-recovery ceiling. Only EKZ, Groupe E, and Primeo apply this cap; everyone else pays base + HKN additively. The cap *mechanism* is established by [StromVV Art. 4 Abs. 3 Bst. e]({stromvv_url}); the numerical ceilings are utility-published derivations.

---

**Sources:** [SFOE feed-in remuneration page]({agency_url}) · [opendata.swiss reference market price dataset]({opendata_url})

tariff.title: Tariff configuration ({utility_name})
tariff.description: Tell us about your plant — utility-published values (HKN rate, cap behavior, fixed prices) come from the bundled tariff database and aren't editable here.

data_description.installierte_leistung_kw:
## Installed peak power
The DC peak rating of your PV plant in kilowatts. Used to look up the federal **Mindestvergütung** floor ([EnV Art. 12 Abs. 1bis]({env_url}), AS 2025 138, in force since 1.1.2026):

| Size | Mode | Federal floor (Rp/kWh) |
|---|---|---|
| <30 kW | any | **6.00** |
| 30–<150 kW | with self-consumption | **180÷kW** (1.20–6.00) |
| 30–<150 kW | feed-in only | **6.20** |
| ≥150 kW | any | no federal floor |
data_description.eigenverbrauch_aktiviert:
## Self-consumption
**Yes** if any portion of your PV production is consumed on-site (typical residential / commercial setup). **No** for full feed-in plants (Volleinspeisung) where 100% of production goes to the grid.

This flag affects the federal floor band you fall into — for 30–<150 kW plants the difference is significant (degressive 180÷kW with self-consumption vs. flat 6.20 Rp/kWh without).
data_description.hkn_aktiviert:
## HKN (Herkunftsnachweis) opt-in
**Yes** if you sell your *Herkunftsnachweise* (Swiss guarantees of origin) to your utility. Most utilities offer this as an opt-in — register through the utility's customer portal.

The rate is fixed by your utility and bundled into this integration's tariff database — no manual entry needed. Set to **No** if you don't sell HKN, or if you've certified the plant elsewhere (e.g. *naturemade star*) and sell HKN on the open market.
data_description.abrechnungs_rhythmus:
## Invoice cycle
Match your utility's invoice cycle. **Most Swiss utilities settle quarterly.** Monthly settlement uses the BFE monthly reference prices for M1/M2 and a derived rate for M3 such that the quarter total equals Q_kWh × Q_quarterly_rate exactly.

entities.title: Home Assistant entity wiring
entities.description: Link the kWh counter for your grid export, the CHF sensor that the Energy Dashboard auto-creates, and a plant name.

data_description.stromnetzeinspeisung_kwh:
## kWh counter
The **kWh counter** that tracks energy fed into the grid.

Must already be wired into the **Energy Dashboard** under *'Return to grid'*.
data_description.rueckliefervergutung_chf:
## Auto-created CHF sensor
The **CHF sensor** that the Energy Dashboard auto-creates when you configure *'Return to grid with a price'*.

HA names it with a `_compensation` suffix (usually `sensor.YOUR_GRID_EXPORT_compensation`). This integration writes into its **Long-Term Statistics**.
data_description.plant_name:
## Plant name
A stable display name for this PV plant — e.g. `Rooftop South`, `Garage Carport`. Used as the integration's title in **Settings → Devices & Services** and as the default for the entity name prefix below.

**Stays the same even if you switch utility later** (utility changes happen via *Configure → Apply config change*).
data_description.namenspraefix:
## Naming prefix
Prefix for this integration's **diagnostic sensors** (e.g. `sensor.PREFIX_basisverguetung`).

**Leave empty** to auto-derive from the plant name (e.g. `rooftop_south_rueckliefertarif`). *Only set explicitly* if you want a custom value or the default would collide with an existing entity.

error.kw_required: Installed power (kW) must be greater than 0.

init.title: BFE Rückliefertarif options
init.description: What would you like to do?

menu_options.apply_change: Apply config change (utility / kW / HKN / billing)

manage_history.title: Manage configuration history
manage_history.description: Click a row to edit, choose **Add new transition** to record a switch (e.g. utility change, PV expansion, HKN certificate), or **Done** to finish. Past quarter recompute uses the values that were active back then.

add_new_row.title: Add transition
add_new_row.description: Record a config change effective from a specific date or quarter.

edit_row.title: Edit transition
edit_row.description: Update or delete this config transition. Tick **Delete this record** to remove it.

apply_change.title: Apply configuration change
apply_change.description:
Record a config change effective from a date or quarter — covers utility switches, kW expansion, HKN opt-in/out, billing rhythm. All fields are pre-filled from your current config; adjust whatever changed.

**Currently active:** {current_summary}

data_description.effective_date:
## When this change takes effect
Default is the current quarter's start. For utility switches mid-quarter, pick the actual switch date — the recompute path will use the new utility for any quarter starting on or after that date.
data_description.installierte_leistung_kw:
## Installed peak power
DC peak rating in kilowatts. Determines the federal **Mindestvergütung** floor band ([EnV Art. 12 Abs. 1bis]({env_url}), AS 2025 138).
data_description.eigenverbrauch_aktiviert:
## Self-consumption
**Yes** for typical residential / commercial setups; **No** for full feed-in (Volleinspeisung).
data_description.hkn_aktiviert:
## HKN opt-in
**Yes** if you sell *Herkunftsnachweise* to your utility. Rate is utility-published.
data_description.abrechnungs_rhythmus:
## Invoice cycle
Match your utility's invoice cycle. Most settle quarterly.

recompute_history.title: Recompute full history
recompute_history.description:
Rewrites all Long-Term Statistics for every BFE-published quarter using your current configuration history (per-quarter utility / HKN / kW). Also writes a conservative **estimate** for the in-progress quarter using the active utility's effective floor (HKN, fixed price, or federal minimum).

Idempotent and safe to re-run.

refresh_prices.title: Refresh prices from BFE
refresh_prices.description: Force a fresh poll of the BFE reference market prices (skips the 6-hour scheduled tick). Auto-imports any quarter BFE has published since the last successful poll.

entities.title: Re-wire Home Assistant entities
entities.description: Re-wire the entity links and rename this entry.

data_description.stromnetzeinspeisung_kwh:
## kWh counter
The **kWh counter** that tracks energy fed into the grid.

Must already be wired into the **Energy Dashboard** under *'Return to grid'*.
data_description.rueckliefervergutung_chf:
## Auto-created CHF sensor
The **CHF sensor** that the Energy Dashboard auto-creates when you configure *'Return to grid with a price'*.

HA names it with a `_compensation` suffix (usually `sensor.YOUR_GRID_EXPORT_compensation`). This integration writes into its **Long-Term Statistics**.
data_description.plant_name:
## Plant name
Display name for this entry — shown in **Settings → Devices & Services**. Editing this field updates the integration's title.
data_description.namenspraefix:
## Naming prefix
Prefix for this integration's **diagnostic sensors** (e.g. `sensor.PREFIX_basisverguetung`).

⚠ **Changing this orphans Long-Term Statistics tied to the old prefix** — only change if you understand the consequence.

error.kw_required: Installed power (kW) must be greater than 0.
error.invalid_valid_from: Invalid date or quarter — expected YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. 2024-08-15) or YYYYQN (e.g. 2024Q3).
error.reimport_failed: Operation failed unexpectedly. Check Settings → System → Logs.
error.cannot_delete_last_record: Cannot delete the only history record — at least one must remain. Edit it instead.
